notes: Official specs: 100W, 2x2 ft coverage, PPFD 521 µmol/m²/s at 12in; PPFD in notes only | Official VIVOSUN page lists PPFD 521 µmol/(m²·s) at 12 in; this is PPFD, not fixture PPF, so ppf_umol_s remains blank. | [Recherche 2026-06-27] Technik ergaenzt: ppfd_umol_m2_s,ppfd_distance_cm | PPFD 521 umol/m2s at 12in (30cm), also 452@14in/377@18in, coverage 2x2ft per trimleaf.com retailer.
